The '''''Python''''' was an [[CR92a Assassin-class corvette|''Assassin''-class corvette]] warship. It was used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in the defection of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] officer [[Zaletta|Commander Zaletta]].

After Ace Azzameen and others had destroyed the minefield surrounding an Imperial [[Communications relay/Legends|Communications relay]] [[Comm Center]], the ''Python'' was called in to download its logs in which they discovered Zaletta's location in the [[Eidoloni system/Legends|Eidoloni system]]. During the download the ''Python'' was threatened by [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]] coming from [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|''Ton-Falk''-class escort carrier]] [[Halberd (escort carrier)|''Halberd'']] which arrived to the area to prevent the operation

''Python'' was successfully defended and delivered the data to the Rebel Intelligence.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
